subject: refactor(ui): reorganize layout — undo/redo to header, pages to Structure, consolidated ContextBar
body:
Move undo/redo from ContextBar to both mobile and desktop headers for
constant visibility. Relocate page management (add/duplicate/delete/reorder)
to a new "Pages" section in the Structure tab. Consolidate page selection
and cell selection into a single compact row in ContextBar. Open Presets
bottom sheet by default on mobile load so users see it's active.

Tags: ui, layout, mobile, ux, structure
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-reorganization
Semver: minor
